sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '听' (listen) changes the structure of the question from 'why don't you listen well' to 'why do you listen or not listen', which alters the meaning of the sentence significantly.
Substituting '好' (well/good) with '我' (me/I) changes the object and meaning of the sentence, making it incoherent compared to the original intent.
